title: Execution interrupted due to memory issues
symptom: After a long-running workflow, n8n shows 'Error in ~6–8 seconds' with no detailed error information. The execution data is not saved, making it difficult to identify the failing node.
applies_when: Workflow execution takes a long time
root_cause: The n8n process is likely being killed by the operating system due to excessive memory usage, often indicated by exit code 137. This can happen when the workflow accumulates too much data in RAM over time, leading to an out-of-memory condition.
fix_steps: Check server logs for 'Killed' or 'Out of memory' messages to confirm the issue.
Enable 'Save Execution Progress' in the workflow settings to capture progress after each node.
Break large loops into smaller batches, processing a limited number of items at a time.
Review timeout settings to ensure they are not causing premature termination.
agent_instruction: Implement batching in your workflow to manage memory usage effectively.
